nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 灌木林
nodes.summary: 灌木林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联86种鸟类，包括Swallow-tailed nightjar、蓝臀毛腿蜂鸟、黄翅星额蜂鸟等86种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Azara's spinetail
nodes.summary: Azara's spinetail（Azara's spinetail，学名 Synallaxis azarae），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联11个分布地点节点。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: superciliosa: Andes of northwestern Argentina between the provinces of Jujuy and Catamarca Azara's spinetail inhabits a variety of semi-open landscapes both humid and drier, including the edges of montane evergreen forest, secondary forest, the edges of cloudforest and elfin forest, bushy pastures and roadsides, riparian thickets, and in Argentina semi-deciduous and deciduous woodlands
